## Tags
paste

## Categories
text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/clipboard-pen-line)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ClipboardPenLine;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ClipboardPenLine { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
